history.content: Hey Claw - Can you go ahead and make me a Landing Page - just a random one about a random SaaS company. Just use a single HTML file - make it a full landing page - different sections, panels, etc. Put it in the workspace. Name it - Landing_2.html
Error: Ollama chat failed: model requires more system memory (3.7 GiB) than is available (1.9 GiB)
